englishDefinitions: choose him to play the role of young Forrest in a film, show, or performance
persianTranslation: او را برای نقش فورستِ جوان انتخاب کردن
او را در نقش فورستِ جوان گذاشتن
examples: The director decided to cast him as young Forrest.
They cast him as young Forrest because he looked the part.
He was thrilled when they cast him as young Forrest.
